programs.name: CalFresh
programs.description: California's SNAP program. Income limits are slightly higher than federal — up to 200% FPL for some households.

monthly_benefit_range.note: Same federal benefit amounts. California adds Disaster CalFresh in emergencies.

income.note: California uses 200% FPL for gross income test under expanded eligibility

application.where: GetCalFresh.org or local county social services office

programs.name: Medi-Cal
programs.description: California's Medicaid program. Covers adults up to 138% FPL. Children and pregnant women up to 266% FPL.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No cost for most enrollees. Covers doctor visits, hospital, prescriptions, mental health, dental, and vision.

eligibility_rules.citizenship: California covers DACA recipients and undocumented children/young adults through age 26

required_documents: Social Security number or immigration documents

programs.name: California EITC
programs.description: State tax credit for low-income working Californians. Can be combined with federal EITC for up to $3,000+ in refunds.

monthly_benefit_range.note: Annual credit up to $3,000+ depending on income and family size. Paid as tax refund.

income.note: Must have earned income. Self-employed workers qualify.

required_documents: Social Security numbers for all family members
